steps.title: Apply the quotient rule for exponents
steps.content: When dividing powers with the same base, subtract the exponents: $$\frac{v^{12}}{v^3} = v^{12-3} = v^9$$

steps.title: Combine the simplified parts
steps.content: Multiply the simplified coefficient by the simplified variable expression: $$\frac{1}{3} \cdot v^9 = \frac{v^9}{3}$$. This matches choice B — B is correct.
